raw_consumer_statement:
I made an online booking using my credit card for traveling. on Sat, XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX I went on CitiTravel.com and used my points ( XXXX points ) to book a 2-week stay from XX/XX/year> - XX/XX/year> When I arrived at my hotel, the booking was inaccurate. I specified a Deluxe Suite for my stay but on the hotel 's booking confirmation, it showed as a standard queen room which is not what I booked. 

I showed them my confirmation and it was very odd that whatever I booked did not show on the hotel 's confirmation. Nevertheless, I could not stay in that room and immediately booked another hotel in person. 

This will all be resolved once I contacted the Citi Travel Department, who assured me that this would all be resolved. One year later with all my follow-up and evidence of incorrect confirmations, I still don't have my XXXX points or cash equivalent refunded to me. 

After countless amount of times that I reached out not one representative of CitiTravel told me to file a complaint and I had to be referred to CFPB by an attorney that is handling a case against CitiBank for other matters.
